name: Are Performance-Optimization Benchmarks Reliably Measuring Coding Agents?
summary: arXiv:2607.01211v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Repository-level performance-optimization benchmarks such as GSO, SWE-Perf and SWE-fficiency evaluate coding agents by applying patches to...
description: arXiv:2607.01211v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Repository-level performance-optimization benchmarks such as GSO, SWE-Perf and SWE-fficiency evaluate coding agents by applying patches to real repositories and comparing runtime against unoptimized baselines and official reference patches. Their leaderboard scores are increasingly used as evidence of coding-agent progress, but those sco...
author: Zhi Chen, Zhensu Sun, Yuling Shi, David Lo, Lingxiao Jiang
